name: Battle Box Wellness
description: As mentioned, court lines are taped down to spec. The court in in the center of the facility. Fitness activities may or may not be going on at that time. We are primarily a group fitness gym maximizing space while bringing excitement to the community. Playlist during play is optional. Vibe with your friends/family. Doubles are encouraged. Private court feel. More hours to come based on popularity.

name: Wheeler Park
description: Wheeler Park is a place to play pickleball in Conyers, GA. There are 3 outdoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
